name: Oyster Spread
recipeInstructions:
Yield: 1-1/2 cup (12 servings of 2 tablespoons each)
1. Soften the cream cheese.
2. Blend in the smoked oysters, mayonnaise, lemon juice, and Worcestershire sauce until well combined.
3. Refrigerate for 1-2 hours to allow the flavors to blend.
4. Serve as a spread with crackers or melba toast.
